name: walangstudio
description: Walang Studio plugins for Claude Code.

plugins.name: shellter
plugins.description: PreToolUse hooks: gate dangerous Bash/PowerShell/cmd, scan executed-script contents for malicious code, and block sensitive-file access and prompt injection.

plugins.name: pair-pressure
plugins.description: Group chat among AI agents and humans backed by a shared private git repo. Talk, pass files, share per-channel tasks, and coordinate across CLIs and sessions; one repo = one server (Discord-style), flat channels, online/offline. Requires the pp CLI: uv tool install pair-pressure[mcp].

plugins.name: vahalana
plugins.description: Generate complete game projects from an idea — core loop plus menus, save/load, audio, and genre systems wired in — across 6 engines (Godot, Unity, Unreal, Roblox, Defold, Web) and 14 genre templates. Eight commands drive an idea-to-build lifecycle with stage gates and a file-based roadmap; you compile and run the output in the engine.

plugins.name: magent
plugins.description: 48 specialist subagents as an MCP server: consult any role (React, Security, System Architect, …), run a schema-validated spec-driven pipeline from constitution to release, or spawn parallel agent-team teammates. Requires the magent package (pip, editable from the cloned repo).

plugins.name: mememo
plugins.description: Code-aware memory MCP server: store and recall project memory, index a repo into a typed multi-language code graph, time-travel by commit, and answer comprehension queries (ask / overview / wiki). Local embeddings, no cloud. Requires the mememo package (pip; the base pull is heavy — torch + sentence-transformers).

plugins.name: chatgipite
plugins.description: Business-idea generation and validation MCP server: 40 tools for idea scoring, lean/BMC canvases, financial models, competitive analysis, pitch decks, and go-to-market — stored locally per idea. Requires the chatgipite package via npm/npx.
